mapper.sql: schedule_id, doctor_id, doctor_name, schedule_date, start_time, end_time, total_slots, booked_slots, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_schedule( doctor_id, doctor_name, schedule_date, start_time, end_time, total_slots, booked_slots, status, create_by, create_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{doctorId}, #{doctorName}, #{scheduleDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{totalSlots}, COALESCE(#{bookedSlots}, 0), #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE clinic_schedule SET booked_slots = COALESCE(booked_slots, 0) + 1 WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND (total_slots IS NULL OR total_slots <= 0 OR COALESCE(booked_slots, 0) < total_slots)
